name: R022 Risk Assessment
source: Question list transcribed from completed HeavyConnect PDF download6.pdf. Live HeavyConnect builder confirmed report_type=517 and first dropdown options.

questions.label: Why are you conducting this risk assessment?
Planned Use
Was the growing area used for growing food crops last season?
What food crops were produced in the last season?
Has the growing area been used for any non-agricultural purposes?
Has the growing area been used for animal husbandry or grazing land for animals in the last 12 months?
Has flooding from uncontrolled causes occurred on the growing area since the previous growth cycle?
In the previous 60 days have any soil amendments or pesticides been applied to the growing area?
Is the adjacent land to the growing area a possible source of contamination from intensive livestock production (e.g., feed lots, dairy operations, poultry houses, meat rendering operation)?
Is there evidence of domestic animals and/or wild animals (includes homes with hobby farms, and non-commercial livestock) in proximity to the growing operation?
Are untreated animal manure piles, compost, biosolids, or non-synthetic amendment stored and/or applied on adjacent land?
What is the intended primary water source for irrigation use?
Is municipal or district water used in the growing operation?
Is well water used in the operation?
Is open flowing surface water used in the operation (e.g., rivers, canals, ditches, etc.)?
Is non-flowing surface water (e.g., ponds, reservoirs, watersheds, etc.) used in the operation?
Are there backflow prevention devices on all main lines?
If the operation stores water (tank, cistern, container), is the storage container well maintained?
Is there above ground access to the water source?
Does the water source and associated equipment appear to be damage and tamper free?
Is the water access (well head, pump house, etc.) covered and protected?
Are there signs of on-site or upstream animal intrusion in the water source? (i.e. livestock, domestic animals, wildlife)

What is the overall condition of the water source? (e.g. issues regarding well cap, well casing, seals, piping tanks, treatment equipment, cross connections, trash, animal presence, pooled water, etc.)
If the overall condition is not good, please provide additional detail and attach a photo of the issue

Is the growing area situated in a higher risk location where contamination could occur from nearby operations or functions (e.g., leach fields, runoff or potential flooding from sewers, toilet systems, industrial facilities, labor camps, etc.)?
Are there any other potential risks in the adjacent land that could potentially lead to contamination of the growing area?
Is there evidence of human fecal matter in the adjacent land to the audited area?
Have soil tests been ordered/conducted to test for metals or other regulated contaminants?
Have you conducted a generic E. coli test on the water (taken from the closest practical point of use)?
Employee name of who reported these checks?
